# Pull Request

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tooling / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] Code and commit messages are in English.
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits and have no AI co-authorship trailers.
- [ ] `npm run lint`, `npm test`, and `npm run build` pass locally.
- [ ] Files stay within the ~200-line limit and follow the architecture layering.
- [ ] Relevant docs/specs were updated.
